findings.message: Breaking schema change: the `Item.name` field is renamed to `title` with no compatible path. Removing/renaming a queryable field breaks every existing client that selects `name`, and there is no deprecated alias retained.
findings.suggestion: Keep `name` for backwards compatibility and add `title` alongside it, or expose `title` while retaining `name` as a `@strawberry.field(deprecation_reason=...)` resolver that returns the same value. Only remove `name` after clients have migrated.
